'''gadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:runcinately|runcinately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:runcinately|runcinately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gadhate|gadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gadhatesher|gadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhatesherĂ«m|gadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gadhatero|gadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gadhateshĂ«|gadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhateshĂ«m|gadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigadhatero|gokigadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigadhateshĂ«|gokigadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhateshĂ«m|gokigadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogadhankerom|gogadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogadhankeshĂ«|gogadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhankeshĂ«m|gogadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogadhankeya|gogadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gadhaterom|gadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhatemu|gadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gadhateya|gadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigadhaterom|gokigadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhatemu|gokigadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigadhateya|gokigadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gadhadhate|gadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gadhadhatesher|gadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhadhatesherĂ«m|gadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gadhadhatero|gadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gadhadhateshĂ«|gadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhadhateshĂ«m|gadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigadhadhatero|gokigadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigadhadhateshĂ«|gokigadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhadhateshĂ«m|gokigadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogadhadhankerom|gogadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogadhadhankeshĂ«|gogadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogadhadhankeshĂ«m|gogadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogadhadhankeya|gogadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gadhadhaterom|gadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gadhadhatemu|gadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gadhadhateya|gadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigadhadhaterom|gokigadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigadhadhatemu|gokigadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigadhadhateya|gokigadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠte|gĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠtesher|gĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠtero|gĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokigĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠterom|gĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠdhĂŠteya|gĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokigĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokigĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafdhafte|gafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafdhaftesher|gafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafdhaftesherĂ«m|gafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafdhaftero|gafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafdhafteshĂ«|gafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafdhafteshĂ«m|gafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafdhaftero|gokigafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafdhafteshĂ«|gokigafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafdhafteshĂ«m|gokigafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafdhafnkerom|gogafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafdhafnkeshĂ«|gogafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gogafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafdhafnkeya|gogafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafdhafterom|gafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafdhaftemu|gafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafdhafteya|gafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafdhafterom|gokigafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafdhaftemu|gokigafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafdhafteya|gokigafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
